packs.title: Advanced Meeting Management
packs.description: Practice advanced meeting vocabulary for presentations and Q&A

stages.prompt: You're chairing a meeting. Tell everyone you'll start with the agenda items.

modelAnswer.kana: ぎだいからはじめます。
modelAnswer.english: Let's start with the agenda items.

stages.prompt: You're giving a presentation to executives. Tell them you'll give a presentation.

modelAnswer.japanese: プレゼンテーションを行います。
modelAnswer.kana: プレゼンテーションをおこないます。

stages.hint: プレゼンテーション — presentation

stages.prompt: After your presentation, you'll take questions. Tell the audience there will be a Q&A session.

modelAnswer.japanese: 質疑応答の時間を設けます。
modelAnswer.kana: しつぎおうとうのじかんをもうけます。
modelAnswer.english: We will have a Q&A session.

stages.hint: 質疑応答 (しつぎおうとう) — Q&A session

stages.prompt: You have a suggestion for the project. Tell the team you have a proposal.
This is a weekly recurring meeting. Tell the new member this is a standing meeting.

modelAnswer.kana: これはていれいかいぎです。

stages.hint: 定例会議 (ていれいかいぎ) — standing/recurring meeting

packs.title: Scheduling & Coordination
packs.description: Practice scheduling, rescheduling, and timeline management

stages.prompt: You need to set up a meeting with a client. Tell them you'll arrange an appointment.

modelAnswer.japanese: アポイントメントを調整します。
modelAnswer.kana: アポイントメントをちょうせいします。

stages.hint: アポイントメント — appointment

stages.prompt: Something came up and you can't make the meeting. Tell them you need to postpone it.

modelAnswer.japanese: 延期させていただけますでしょうか。
modelAnswer.kana: えんきさせていただけますでしょうか。

stages.prompt: The deadline is too tight. Ask if you can move the deadline forward (to an earlier date).

modelAnswer.kana: まえだおしにできますか。
modelAnswer.english: Can we move it up (to an earlier date)?

stages.hint: 前倒し (まえだおし) — moving up schedule

stages.prompt: The client requested a schedule change. Tell your team you need to reschedule.

modelAnswer.japanese: リスケする必要があります。
modelAnswer.kana: リスケするひつようがあります。

stages.prompt: You're leaving work on time today (not working late). Tell your team you're leaving at regular hours.

modelAnswer.japanese: 今日は定時に帰ります。
modelAnswer.kana: きょうはていじにかえります。
modelAnswer.english: I'll leave at regular hours today.

stages.hint: 定時 (ていじ) — regular working hours
